title: Figure 5 from: Herrera Mesías F, Weigand AM (2021) Updates to the checklist of the wild bee fauna of Luxembourg as inferred from revised natural history collection data and fieldwork. Biodiversity Data Journal 9: e64027. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.9.e64027
author: Herrera Mesías, Fernanda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Sphecodes majalis (Pérez, 1903) (Manternach, specimen MNHNL100057; BOLD identifier MNHNL163-21, one middle leg was used for DNA extraction). a. Dorsal view; b. Lateral view; c. Antenna, showing flagellar segments; d. Left hind tibia, showing spines in pale pubescence; e. Tergites 4 and 5; f. Genitalia. Photos: MNHNL. Background edited using GIMP 2.8.22 (The GIMP Development Team 2020).
